name: edge-links
description: A Cloudflare-native, single-owner URL shortener using Workers and Durable Objects.

SITE_NAME.description: A friendly name shown on status and error pages. Default: `Edge Links`.

PUBLIC_ORIGIN.description: The canonical short-link domain, including `https://`. Leave blank to use the assigned workers.dev address or current host.

DASHBOARD_HOST.description: Optional separate dashboard host, without `https://` or a path. Leave blank when the dashboard and links share one domain.

ROOT_REDIRECT_URL.description: Optional destination for the public short-link domain's home page. Leave blank unless you use a separate dashboard host.

LINK_LENGTH.description: Number of characters in random short links. Keep the default of `6` unless you have a reason to change it.

scripts.check: npm run types && npm run typecheck && npm test
